title: Anti-pattern field added to memory schema
context: The schema captured only positive knowledge until MEM-001 added anti_patterns.
content: Memory entries can now capture rejected approaches alongside adopted ones, preventing rediscovery of known dead-ends.
anti_patterns: Did not add a separate anti_pattern memory type because it would fragment the typology and break filter logic in q-memory.
Did not add confidence_score field because LLM-generated scores are unverifiable and create false precision.
